text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Spring Stakes. The long
distance would have been hard for Mihono
Bourbon to complete before her debut, but now
she can run it at full power.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's full of confidence for the race but says that
if she fails to win it, she's willing to change course
for her future.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The curtains rise on the Spring Stakes, the
stepping stone to the Satsuki Sho.
